languages.text: Пробудившиеся машинные духи деловито гудят в корпусе старинного устройства. Каждая клавиша тщательно покрыта тонким слоем священной смазки, а кабели слегка искрятся.

traits.locale_text: Пробудившиеся машинные духи деловито гудят в корпусе старинного устройства. Каждая клавиша тщательно покрыта тонким слоем священной смазки, а кабели слегка искрятся, словно от переполняющей их радости.

languages.text: The awakened machine spirits hum industriously in the casing of the ancient device. Each key is carefully coated with a thin layer of sacred unguent, and the cables spark slightly.
languages.original_text: Пробудившиеся машинные духи деловито гудят в корпусе старинного устройства. Каждая клавиша тщательно покрыта тонким слоем священной смазки, а кабели слегка искрятся.

traits.locale_text: The awakened machine spirits hum industriously in the casing of the ancient device. Each key is carefully coated with a thin layer of sacred unguent, and the cables spark slightly.
The awakened machine spirits hum industriously in the casing of the ancient device. Each key is carefully coated with a thin layer of sacred unguent, and the cables spark slightly.
The awakened machine spirits hum industriously in the casing of the ancient device. Each key is carefully coated with a thin layer of sacred unguent, and the cables spark slightly.

languages.text: 目覚めた機械の精霊は、古き装置の筐体の中で、産業のように働き続ける。各キーは、薄く聖なる油が塗られ、ケーブルはわずかに火花を散らす。
languages.original_text: The awakened machine spirits hum industriously in the casing of the ancient device. Each key is carefully coated with a thin layer of sacred unguent, and the cables spark slightly.

languages.text: Uyanmış makine ruhları, kadim cihazın kasasında harıl harıl çalışıyor. Her tuş, ince bir kutsal özyağ tabakasıyla dikkatlice kaplanmış. Kablolar da hafifçe kıvılcım saçıyor.
languages.original_text: The awakened machine spirits hum industriously in the casing of the ancient device. Each key is carefully coated with a thin layer of sacred unguent, and the cables spark slightly.

traits.locale_text: Uyanmış makine ruhları, kadim cihazın kasasında harıl harıl çalışıyor. Her tuş, ince bir kutsal özyağ tabakasıyla dikkatlice kaplanmış. Kablolar da hafifçe kıvılcım saçıyor.

languages.text: 苏醒的机魂在古老设备的外壳内孜孜不倦地低鸣，每个按键都精心涂覆着薄薄的神圣机油，线缆间不时迸出细碎的电火花。
languages.original_text: The awakened machine spirits hum industriously in the casing of the ancient device. Each key is carefully coated with a thin layer of sacred unguent, and the cables spark slightly.

traits.locale_text: 苏醒的机魂在古老设备的外壳内孜孜不倦地低鸣，每个按键都精心涂覆着薄薄的神圣机油，线缆间不时迸出细碎的电火花。

languages.text: Die erweckten Maschinengeister summen emsig im Gehäuse des alten Geräts. Jede Taste ist sorgfältig mit einer dünnen Schicht aus heiliger Salbe bestrichen, und aus dem Kabel sprühen Funken.
languages.original_text: The awakened machine spirits hum industriously in the casing of the ancient device. Each key is carefully coated with a thin layer of sacred unguent, and the cables spark slightly.

traits.locale_text: Die erweckten Maschinengeister summen emsig im Gehäuse des alten Geräts. Jede Taste ist sorgfältig mit einer dünnen Schicht aus heiliger Salbe bestrichen, und aus dem Kabel sprühen Funken.

languages.text: Les esprits de la machine, maintenant réveillés, bourdonnent dans le boîtier de l'ancien appareil. Chaque touche est soigneusement recouverte d'une fine couche d'onguent sacré, et les câbles émettent de petites étincelles.
languages.original_text: The awakened machine spirits hum industriously in the casing of the ancient device. Each key is carefully coated with a thin layer of sacred unguent, and the cables spark slightly.

traits.locale_text: Les esprits de la machine, maintenant réveillés, bourdonnent dans le boîtier de l'ancien appareil. Chaque touche est soigneusement recouverte d'une fine couche d'onguent sacré, et les câbles émettent de petites étincelles.

languages.text: Los espíritus máquina despiertos zumban, trabajadores, en la carcasa del antiguo dispositivo. Cada tecla está cubierta de una fina capa de ungüento sagrado y los cables chisporrotean ligeramente.
languages.original_text: The awakened machine spirits hum industriously in the casing of the ancient device. Each key is carefully coated with a thin layer of sacred unguent, and the cables spark slightly.

traits.locale_text: Los espíritus máquina despiertos zumban, trabajadores, en la carcasa del antiguo dispositivo. Cada tecla está cubierta de una fina capa de ungüento sagrado y los cables chisporrotean ligeramente.
